steps: Go to https://dashboard.razorpay.com/register and create a free Razorpay account
Complete KYC verification (required for live payments; Test mode is available without KYC)
Log in to the Razorpay Dashboard at https://dashboard.razorpay.com
Navigate to Settings > API Keys, or go directly to https://dashboard.razorpay.com/app/keys
Select the mode: 'Test' for sandbox or 'Live' for production
A popup will display the Key ID and Key Secret — copy both immediately
The Key Secret is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Key ID
credential_fields.description: Your Razorpay Key ID, used as the username in HTTP Basic Auth

notes: Razorpay uses HTTP Basic Auth with Key ID as username and Key Secret as password
Test keys are prefixed with rzp_test_; Live keys are prefixed with rzp_live_
The Key Secret is shown only once — store it immediately in a password manager
Razorpay is primarily for India-based businesses; international payments require additional setup
Test mode provides a sandbox with virtual payment simulation — no real charges
Live mode requires completing KYC and business verification
Rate limit: 100 requests/second in live mode; lower limits in test mode

test_endpoint.description: List orders — returns empty array on a new account, confirming credentials are valid
